title: Safe Reroll
description: Safe Reroll is a client-side Fabric mod that blocks further sword damage rerolls once your configured percentage limit is reached.
body:
Safe Reroll is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod designed to protect players from accidentally losing a good sword damage percentage while rerolling upgrade bonuses on supported servers.

The mod allows you to set your own percentage limit in a simple in-game configuration screen. When your sword reaches or exceeds the configured value, Safe Reroll blocks further reroll attempts in the supported upgrade interface. This helps prevent one click too many from overwriting a good result.

Safe Reroll does not automate gameplay or roll bonuses for you. You still control the process manually. The mod only acts as a safety layer to stop accidental rerolls after your selected limit has been reached.

Supported servers:

- anarchia.gg
- pykmc.pl
- minestar.pl
- rapy.gg

Features:

- blocks further sword damage rerolls after your configured percentage limit is reached
- helps protect high percentage sword damage rolls
- simple in-game configuration screen
- configurable percentage limit
- works directly inside supported sword upgrade interfaces
- client-side usage
- focused on protection, not automation

Example use cases:

- set a safe stopping point before rerolling sword damage bonuses
- prevent accidentally overwriting a good sword percentage
- protect valuable sword damage rolls
- make manual rerolling safer on supported servers

Requirements:

- Minecraft with Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

Safe Reroll is lightweight and client-side. It does not automate gameplay or guarantee better rolls; it only helps prevent accidental sword damage rerolls after your configured limit has been reached.
